steps.title: Match the present-tense actions
steps.content: The sentence describes what the Solar Wind Sherpas generally do when an eclipse is imminent. The verbs are present tense: they “travel,” the particles “are,” and the Sherpas “pack up” their telescopes. The blank should continue that present-tense pattern.

steps.title: Eliminate tense shifts
steps.content: Choice B, “had gotten,” is past perfect and does not fit the general present statement. Choice C, “got,” shifts to past tense. Choice D, “were getting,” is past progressive. The base present verb fits the plural subject “the Sherpas.” The answer is A.
